summary: Iteration 58: Repack Products in Pricing Scan Feature - Backend tests ALL PASSED (10/10). Frontend code correctly implements REPACK badge, parent info, and (derived) indicator. API confirmed returning repack 'R VITMIN PRO POWDER' with is_repack=true, parent_name='updated by cashier', units_per_parent=20, effective_cost=25 (derived from 500/20).

minor.issue: Pre-existing: Duplicate price_scheme keys in DB causing repeated entries in problem_schemes (retail appearing 17 times). Not related to repack fix.

issues: Dialog header shows '2 Products Below Cost' but only 1 product row was visible in screenshots - possible rendering or scroll issue, needs manual verification

console_warnings: React key warnings: 'Encountered two children with the same key' for retail, wholesale, special - caused by duplicate scheme keys in database

BACKEND_API_TESTS.test_04_repack_has_derived_indicator: PASS - is_repack flag for frontend display
BACKEND_API_TESTS.test_find_vitamin_pro_repack: PASS - Found R VITMIN PRO POWDER repack
BACKEND_API_TESTS.test_product_search_detail_returns_repac: PASS - search-detail returns effective_capital for repacks

FRONTEND_CODE_REVIEW.REPACK_badge_implementation: PASS - Line 337-339: purple badge with 'REPACK' text
FRONTEND_CODE_REVIEW.derived_indicator: PASS - Line 352-354: '(derived)' text for repack cost

action_items: Manual verification recommended: Check price scan dialog displays both products (1 parent + 1 repack) correctly
Optional: Consider deduplicating price_schemes in database to fix React key warnings
critical_code_review_comments: Backend pricing-scan endpoint correctly loads repacks separately and builds parent_cost_map
Repack cost derivation: parent_cost / units_per_parent is correctly implemented
Branch price override for parent is correctly applied to repack derived cost
Moving avg and last purchase correctly lookup parent's movements and divide by units_per_parent
Frontend code has correct conditional rendering for is_repack products

success_rate.frontend: Code verified correct, UI display needs manual verification

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing repack product 'R VITMIN PRO POWDER (1 X 20)'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 58 verified the repack pricing scan feature. Backend confirmed working: GET /api/products/pricing-scan now returns repack products with is_repack=true, parent_name, units_per_parent, and derived effective_cost. The specific repack tested was 'R VITMIN PRO POWDER (1 X 20)' with derived cost 25 from parent cost 500/20 units. Frontend code at PriceScanManager.js lines 334-355 correctly displays: (1) REPACK badge in purple, (2) 'from {parent} ({units}/parent)' text, (3) '(derived)' indicator. Note: There are pre-existing duplicate price_schemes in DB causing React key warnings - not related to this feature.

rca_of_the_issue.feature_summary: Pricing scan now includes repack products with derived cost calculation
implementation_details: 1. Backend loads repacks separately: db.products.find({is_repack: true})
2. Builds parent cost map for cost derivation
4. If branch has cost override for parent, uses that instead
5. Moving avg and last purchase also derived from parent purchase history / units_per_parent
6. Frontend shows REPACK badge, parent info, and (derived) indicator
